option_line: bffi_deliverKeepfaithOak:Deliver Bornanew's body into custody of the Knights of Ludd.
original: Deliver Bornanew's body into custody of the Knights of Ludd.
translated: Remettre le corps de Bornanew aux Chevaliers de Ludd.

original:
The expression of the Excubitor Orbis does not change. Nonetheless, a coldness seems to have come over him, as if transformed into a statue.

The moment draws out and you think he might not respond, then he speaks. "Bring them both."

He remains stone-faced.
translated:
L'expression de l'Excubitor Orbis ne change pas. Néanmoins, une froideur semble s'être emparée de lui, comme s'il s'était transformé en statue.

Le moment s'étire et vous pensez qu'il pourrait ne pas répondre, puis il parle. "Amenez-les tous les deux."

Il reste de marbre.

option_line: bffi_deliverKeepfaithOak:Deliver Bornanew and Keepfaith into custody of the Knights of Ludd.
original: Deliver Bornanew and Keepfaith into custody of the Knights of Ludd.
translated: Remettre Bornanew et Keepfaith aux Chevaliers de Ludd.

original: The Excubitor Orbis seems uninclined to make further conversation, so you close the link and order your comms officer to handle the details while a shuttle is prepared.
translated: L'Excubitor Orbis ne semble pas enclin à poursuivre la conversation, alors vous coupez la liaison et ordonnez à votre officier de communication de gérer les détails pendant qu'une navette est préparée.

option_line: 2:bffi_deliverToOak:Deliver Cedra Keepfaith into custody of the Knights of Ludd
original: bffi_deliverToOak:Deliver Cedra Keepfaith into custody of the Knights of Ludd
translated: bffi_deliverToOak:Remettre Cedra Keepfaith aux Chevaliers de Ludd

option_line: 2:bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew to the Knights of Ludd
original: bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew to the Knights of Ludd
translated: bffi_deliverToOak:Descendre en navette pour remettre Bornanew aux Chevaliers de Ludd

option_line: 2:bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew back to the Knights of Ludd
original: bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew back to the Knights of Ludd
translated: bffi_deliverToOak:Descendre en navette pour ramener Bornanew aux Chevaliers de Ludd

option_line: 2:bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew's body to the Knights of Ludd
original: bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew's body to the Knights of Ludd
translated: bffi_deliverToOak:Descendre en navette pour remettre le corps de Bornanew aux Chevaliers de Ludd

option_line: 2:bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew's body and the prisoner to the Knights
original: bffi_deliverToOak:Shuttle down to deliver Bornanew's body and the prisoner to the Knights
translated: bffi_deliverToOak:Descendre en navette pour remettre le corps de Bornanew et la prisonnière aux Chevaliers
